blockingIssues.description: Slack authorization in reply listener is only enforced when authorizedSlackUserIds is non-empty, leaving unrestricted injection when list is unset/empty (does not fully satisfy VAL-SEC-002).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define and version-control the `bugfix-worker` skill (or stop referencing it in mission features) so scrutiny can audit expected worker procedure against an actual skill definition.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission features reference `skillName: bugfix-worker`, while reviewer observation reports no discoverable `bugfix-worker` skill definition file.

rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous mission bootstrap expectation; no safe additive service change to apply from this milestone review
already-noted infrastructure gap without concrete, verified knowledge entry to apply now
